author: Walt Disney Imagineering YouTube
text:
INSIDE Disney’s Groundbreaking Robotic Marble Sculpting | Grumpy's Gauntlet
Ever wondered how Disney Imagineers bring magic to life? For the first time ever, we’re using cutting-edge robotics to carve a larger-than-life Grumpy out of solid marble—right here at Magnolia Golf Course, Walt Disney World!

This isn’t just a statue. It’s a game-changer for themed entertainment and fabrication:
⚙️ Advanced robotic arms sculpt natural stone with incredible precision
🌱 Greener, cost-effective, and built to withstand Florida’s wild weather
🏰 A modern tribute to Disney’s legacy—honoring the original marble dwarves from Disneyland
🎨 Where innovation meets artistry: expert stone carvers and high-tech tools, working together

From concept to creation, our Imagineers blend storytelling, art, science, and technology to craft unforgettable experiences for families around the world.
